mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_fact ( id, conversation_id, source_message_id, source_type, scope, fact_key, fact_value, confidence, status ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{sourceMessageId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{sourceType}, #{scope}, #{key}, #{value}, #{confidence}, 'ACTIVE' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE source_message_id = VALUES(source_message_id), source_type = VALUES(source_type), fact_value = VALUES(fact_value), confidence = VALUES(confidence), status = 'ACTIVE', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(conversation_id) AS conversationId, BIN_TO_UUID(source_message_id) AS sourceMessageId, source_type AS sourceType, scope, fact_key AS `key`, fact_value AS `value`, confidence, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM conversation_fact WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
